text: Within these walls, bathed in shifting neon, I feel a blend of fascination and self-consciousness. The R+D display urges inquiry and reflection, yet I can't help but notice my own immersion—caught between curiosity and uncertainty. The words on the screen resonate deeply: being seen, misunderstood, longing for connection. This space feels both inviting and unsettling, as if amplifying my inner philosophical questions about existence and perception.
